corrections.note: Printed form has grave accent on ἐν, not acute.
Printed γῆν has no final comma; punctuation should be removed.
No comma after γῆν in the image.

corrections.correct:
17φωνὴ βροντῆς αὐτοῦ ὠνείδισεν γῆν
    καὶ καταιγὶς βορέου καὶ συστροφὴ πνεύματος.
18ὡς πετεινὰ καθιπτάμενα πάσσει χιόνα,
corrections.note: The left-margin (19) is a page line indicator, not a verse number; the verse number printed at right is 18.

notes: Running head matches. Body is largely correct; right-margin verse numbers are present, and one left-margin line number was mistakenly captured as a verse marker. Apparatus otherwise matches the page.
